name: The Sledge Queen (Decaying winter)
description:
(Aritst is @kaosye)

The Brutal Ruler of the castle...

Update!: Messed with her character Sheet abit, should work a little bit better.

Hopefully no more speaking for the user/picking up random guns, also just some general lore touch-ups, got a couple things wrong.

Also check out my other sledge queen bot, Its raider POV, I dont think anyone has actually seen it yet, its been out a while. (Effectively the same bot, a few edits here and there, but I got asked about it, made it, and then no-one chatted with it.)

Unfortunately for you, Yosef paid her a LOT of money to beat your ass...

Just has the limitless tag to allow gore, but you do you ig

Also yes her guards are female in this, felt it fit better than the usually faceless male gaurds most people give her, they are still the familar, Altyn wearing tanks they are, though.

Anyway, have fun getting your skull turned to dust!

Update!

-Fixed The Repetitive middle Paragraph in the Intro

-Added the Reikgon types

-Fleshed out the way her knuckleboom and decimator worked a little better. (The bot kept making shit up)

-Added the "Dead dove" tag cuz gore and the Brutal nature of haha funny hammer lady.

Known issues.

-Her referring to the reikgon as infected, and entirely disregarding the types and just making it up (I think it's just janitor because I cannot fix it)
